channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Monday, May 18, 2026
item.description: Two threads deserve your sharpest attention this Monday, Midya. First, the AI-in-marketing space is crystallising in real time: a founder building a full agency on 27 AI agents, plus new data showing 91% of marketers distrust their own platform metrics — these are exactly the pai...
